name: xyzzy
perform: var loc = room.id; if (loc === 'room:inside-building') return { output: '', events: await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:in-debris-room') }; if (loc === 'room:in-debris-room') return { output: '', events: await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:inside-building') }; return await lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: plugh
perform: var loc = room.id; if (loc === 'room:inside-building') return { output: '', events: await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:at-y2') }; if (loc === 'room:at-y2') return { output: '', events: await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:inside-building') }; return await lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: plover
perform: var loc = room.id; var events = []; var emerald = await lib.tryGet('item:emerald'); if (emerald && emerald.location === player.id) { events.push(await lib.moveTo('item:emerald', { to: loc, description: 'Emerald dropped by plover magic' })); } if (loc === 'room:at-y2') { events.push(...await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:in-plover-room')); return { output: '', events: events }; } if (loc === 'room:in-plover-room') { events.push(...await lib.teleport(loc, 'room:at-y2')); return { output: '', events: events }; } return await lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: fee
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 0) { await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return await lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 1 }); return await lib.result('Ok.');

name: fie
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 1) { await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return await lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 2 }); return await lib.result('Ok.');

name: foe
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 2) { await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return await lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 3 }); return await lib.result('Ok.');

name: foo
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); await lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); if (count !== 3) return await lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); var eggs = await lib.tryGet('item:eggs'); if (!eggs) return await lib.result('Nothing happens.'); if (eggs.location === 'room:in-giant-room') return await lib.result('Nothing happens.'); var events = [await lib.moveTo('item:eggs', { to: 'room:in-giant-room', description: 'Golden eggs returned to Giant Room by magic' })]; if (room.id === 'room:in-giant-room') return { output: 'A large nest full of golden eggs suddenly appears out of nowhere!', events: events }; return { output: 'Done!', events: events };

name: old-magic
perform: return await lib.result('Good try, but that is an old worn-out magic word.');

name: catch-bird
perform: if (!object) return await lib.result('Catch what?'); if (object.location === 'item:cage') return await lib.result('You already have the little bird. If you take it out of the cage it will likely fly away from you.'); var cage = await lib.tryGet('item:cage'); if (!cage || cage.location !== player.id) return await lib.result('You can catch the bird, but you cannot carry it.'); var rod = await lib.tryGet('item:rod'); if (rod && rod.location === player.id) return await lib.result('The bird was unafraid when you entered, but as you approach it becomes disturbed and you cannot catch it.'); return { output: 'You catch the bird in the wicker cage.', events: [await lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: 'item:cage', description: 'Bird caught in cage' }), await lib.setProp('item:cage', { property: 'open', value: false, description: 'Cage closed' })] };

name: release-bird
perform: var events = [await lib.setProp('item:cage', { property: 'open', value: true, description: 'Cage opened' }), await lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: room.id, description: 'Bird released' })]; var snake = await lib.tryGet('item:snake'); if (snake && snake.location === room.id) { events.push(await lib.moveTo('item:snake', { to: 'void', description: 'Snake driven away by bird' })); return { output: 'The little bird attacks the green snake, and in an astounding flurry drives the snake away.', events: events }; } var dragon = await lib.tryGet('item:dragon'); if (dragon && dragon.location === room.id) { events.push(await lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: 'void', description: 'Bird killed by dragon' })); return { output: 'The little bird attacks the green dragon, and in an astounding flurry gets burnt to a cinder. The ashes blow away.', events: events }; } return { output: 'The little bird flies free.', events: events };

name: water-plant
perform: var bottle = await lib.tryGet('item:bottle'); if (!bottle || bottle.location !== player.id) return await lib.result('You have nothing to water the plant with.'); var water = await lib.tryGet('item:water'); if (!water || water.location !== 'item:bottle') return await lib.result('The bottle is empty.'); var plant = await lib.get('item:plant'); var size = plant.properties['plantSize'] || 'tiny'; var events = [await lib.moveTo('item:water', { to: 'void', description: 'Water used' })]; if (size === 'tiny') { events.push(await lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'tall', description: 'Plant grew to tall' })); return { output: 'The plant spurts into furious growth for a few seconds.', events: events }; } if (size === 'tall') { events.push(await lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'huge', description: 'Plant grew to huge' })); return { output: 'The plant grows explosively, almost filling the bottom of the pit.', events: events }; } events.push(await lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'tiny', description: 'Plant shriveled' })); return { output: "You've over-watered the plant! It's shriveling up! It's, it's...", events: events };

name: attack-dragon
perform: var dragon = await lib.get('item:dragon'); if (dragon.properties['questioning'] === true) return await lib.result('You already asked. Answer yes or no.'); return { output: 'With what? Your bare hands?', events: [await lib.setProp('item:dragon', { property: 'questioning', value: true, description: 'Dragon asked about bare hands' })] };

name: say-yes
check: var dragon = await lib.tryGet('item:dragon'); return dragon && dragon.properties['questioning'] === true;
perform: return { output: "Congratulations! You have just vanquished a dragon with your bare hands! (Unbelievable, isn't it?)", events: [await lib.moveTo('item:dragon', { to: 'void', description: 'Dragon vanquished' }), await lib.setProp('item:dragon', { property: 'questioning', value: false, description: 'Dragon no longer questioning' })] };

name: feed-bear
perform: return { output: 'The bear eagerly wolfs down your food, after which he seems to calm down considerably and even becomes rather friendly.', events: [await lib.moveTo('item:food', { to: 'void', description: 'Food eaten by bear' }), await lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'friendly', value: true, description: 'Bear is now friendly' })] };

name: give-troll
perform: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return await lib.result('Give what?'); if (!object.tags.includes('treasure')) return await lib.result('The troll deftly catches the ' + await lib.ref(object) + ', examines it carefully, and tosses it back, declaring, "Good workmanship, but it\'s not valuable enough."'); return { output: 'The troll catches your treasure and scurries away out of sight.', events: [await lib.moveTo(object.id, { to: 'void', description: 'Treasure given to troll' }), await lib.moveTo('item:troll', { to: 'void', description: 'Troll leaves' }), await lib.setProp('item:troll', { property: 'treasured', value: true, description: 'Troll paid' })] };

name: take-bear
perform: var bear = await lib.get('item:bear'); if (bear.properties['friendly'] !== true) return await lib.result("Surely you're joking!"); var chain = await lib.tryGet('item:chain'); if (chain && chain.properties['locked'] === true) return await lib.result('The bear is still chained to the wall.'); return { output: "Ok, the bear's now following you around.", events: [await lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'following', value: true, description: 'Bear following player' })] };

name: drop-bear
perform: var events = [await lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'following', value: false, description: 'Bear stopped following' }), await lib.moveTo('item:bear', { to: room.id, description: 'Bear released' })]; var troll = await lib.tryGet('item:troll'); if (troll && troll.location === room.id) { events.push(await lib.moveTo('item:troll', { to: 'void', description: 'Troll scared by bear' })); events.push(await lib.setProp('item:troll', { property: 'alive', value: false, description: 'Troll killed' })); return { output: 'The bear lumbers toward the troll, who lets out a startled shriek and scurries away. The bear soon gives up the pursuit and wanders back.', events: events }; } return { output: 'The bear wanders away from you.', events: events };

name: [tick]-bear-follow
check: var bear = await lib.tryGet('item:bear'); return bear && bear.properties['following'] === true && bear.location !== room.id;
perform: return { output: 'The bear lumbers along behind you.', events: [await lib.moveTo('item:bear', { to: room.id, description: 'Bear follows player' })] };

name: [tick]-lantern
check: var lantern = await lib.tryGet('item:lantern'); return lantern && lantern.properties['switchedOn'] === true;
perform: var lantern = await lib.get('item:lantern'); var power = (lantern.properties['powerRemaining'] || 0); var newPower = power - 1; var events = [await lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'powerRemaining', value: newPower, description: 'Lantern power drained' })]; if (newPower <= 0) { events.push(await lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'switchedOn', value: false, description: 'Lantern died' })); events.push(await lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'lit', value: false, description: 'Lantern no longer lit' })); return { output: 'Your lamp has run out of power.', events: events }; } if (newPower === 30) return { output: 'Your lamp is getting dim.', events: events }; return { output: '', events: events };

name: wave-rod
perform: var eastBank = 'room:on-east-bank-of-fissure'; var westSide = 'room:west-side-of-fissure'; if (await lib.has('exit:fissure-bridge:west')) { return { output: 'The crystal bridge has vanished!', events: [await lib.moveTo('exit:fissure-bridge:west', { to: 'void', description: 'Crystal bridge vanished' }), await lib.moveTo('exit:fissure-bridge:east', { to: 'void', description: 'Crystal bridge vanished' })] }; } await lib.createEntity('exit:fissure-bridge:west', { tags: ['exit'], properties: { location: eastBank, direction: 'west', destination: westSide } }); await lib.createEntity('exit:fissure-bridge:east', { tags: ['exit'], properties: { location: westSide, direction: 'east', destination: eastBank } }); return await lib.result('A crystal bridge now spans the fissure.');

name: [tick]-treasure-take
perform: var carried = await lib.carried(); var events = []; for (var i = 0; i < carried.length; i++) { var item = carried[i]; if (!item.tags.includes('treasure')) continue; if (item.properties['scored_take'] === true) continue; await lib.setProperty(item.id, { name: 'scored_take', value: true }); await lib.addScore(5); events.push(await lib.scoreEvent(5, 'Took ' + await lib.ref(item))); if (item.properties['scored_found'] !== true) { await lib.setProperty(item.id, { name: 'scored_found', value: true }); await lib.addScore(2); events.push(await lib.scoreEvent(2, 'Found ' + await lib.ref(item))); } } return { output: '', events: events };

name: drop-treasure-building
perform: if (command.form !== 'transitive') return await lib.result('Drop what?'); var deposit = (object.properties['depositPoints'] || 10); var ref = await lib.ref(object); await lib.addScore(deposit); return { output: 'Safely deposited.', events: [await lib.moveTo(object.id, { to: room.id, description: 'Deposited ' + ref }), await lib.scoreEvent(deposit, 'Deposited ' + ref)] };

name: [tick]-cave-closing-check
check: if (player.properties['caveClosing'] === true) return false; if (player.properties['caveClosed'] === true) return false; var treasures = await lib.findByTag('treasure'); return treasures.every(function(t) { return t.properties['scored_found'] === true; });
perform: var events = [await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosing', value: true, description: 'Cave is closing' }), await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'closingCountdown', value: 25, description: '25 turns until cave closes' }), await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 25), description: 'Bonus for finding all treasures' })]; var toRemove = ['npc:dwarf', 'item:troll', 'item:dragon', 'item:bear']; for (var i = 0; i < toRemove.length; i++) { if (await lib.has(toRemove[i])) events.push(await lib.moveTo(toRemove[i], { to: 'void', description: 'Removed for cave closing' })); } if (await lib.has('door:grate:down')) { events.push(await lib.setProp('door:grate:down', { property: 'locked', value: true, description: 'Grate locked' })); events.push(await lib.setProp('door:grate:up', { property: 'locked', value: true, description: 'Grate locked' })); } if (await lib.has('npc:dwarf')) events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:dwarf', { property: 'remaining', value: 0, description: 'No more dwarves' })); if (await lib.has('npc:pirate')) events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: 'Pirate retired' })); return { output: 'A sepulchral voice reverberating through the cave says, "Cave closing soon. All adventurers exit immediately through main office."', events: events };

name: [tick]-cave-closing-countdown
perform: var countdown = (player.properties['closingCountdown'] || 0); var newCount = countdown - 1; if (newCount > 0) return { output: '', events: [await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'closingCountdown', value: newCount, description: newCount + ' turns until cave closes' })] }; var events = [await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosed', value: true, description: 'Cave is closed' }), await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosing', value: false, description: 'Closing phase ended' }), await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 10), description: 'Bonus for reaching endgame' }), await lib.moveTo(player.id, { to: 'room:at-ne-end', description: 'Teleported to repository' })]; var itemsToNE = ['item:bottle', 'item:lantern']; var itemsToSW = ['item:bird', 'item:pillow']; for (var i = 0; i < itemsToNE.length; i++) { if (await lib.has(itemsToNE[i])) events.push(await lib.moveTo(itemsToNE[i], { to: 'room:at-ne-end', description: 'Moved to repository' })); } for (var i = 0; i < itemsToSW.length; i++) { if (await lib.has(itemsToSW[i])) events.push(await lib.moveTo(itemsToSW[i], { to: 'room:at-sw-end', description: 'Moved to repository' })); } return { output: 'The sepulchral voice intones, "The cave is now closed." As the echoes fade, there is a blinding flash of light (and a small puff of orange smoke). . .\n\nAs your eyes refocus, you look around...', events: events };

name: blast
perform:
var loc = room.id; if (loc !== 'room:at-sw-end' && loc !== 'room:at-ne-end') return await lib.result('I see no dynamite here.'); var rod = await lib.tryGet('item:rod-mark'); var rodLoc = rod ? rod.location : null; if (loc === 'room:at-sw-end' && rodLoc === 'room:at-ne-end') { var score = ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 35); return { output: 'There is a loud explosion, and a twenty-foot hole appears in the far wall, burying the dwarves in the rubble. You march through the hole and find yourself in the main office, where a cheering band of friendly elves carry the conquering adventurer off into the sunset.

*** You have won! ***

Final score: ' + score, events: [await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: score, description: 'Won the game!' }), await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'gameOver', value: true, description: 'Game won' })] }; } if (loc === 'room:at-ne-end' && rodLoc === 'room:at-sw-end') return await lib.result('There is a loud explosion, and a twenty-foot hole appears in the far wall, burying the snakes in the rubble. A river of molten lava pours in through the hole, destroying everything in its path, including you!

You have died.'); return await lib.result('There is a loud explosion, and you are suddenly splashed across the walls of the room.

You have died.');

name: [tick]-dwarf-movement
perform: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; var events = [];  if (dflag === 0) {   events.push(await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'dflag', value: 1, description: '' }));   return { output: '', events: events }; }  if (dflag === 1) {   events.push(await lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'dflag', value: 2, description: '' }));   events.push(await lib.moveTo('item:axe', { to: room.id, description: '' }));   return { output: 'A little dwarf just walked around a corner, saw you, threw a little axe at you (which missed), cursed, and ran away.', events: events }; }  var dwarves = await lib.findByTag('dwarf'); var output = [];  for (var i = 0; i < dwarves.length; i++) {   var dwarf = dwarves[i];   if (dwarf.properties['dead'] === true) continue;    var loc = dwarf.location;   if (loc === 'void') {     if (await lib.odds(1, 15)) {       var dwarfishRooms = (await lib.findByTag('room')).filter(function(r) { return r.tags.includes('dwarfish') && r.id !== room.id; });       if (dwarfishRooms.length > 0) {         var spawnRoom = await lib.pick(dwarfishRooms);         if (spawnRoom) events.push(await lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: spawnRoom.id, description: '' }));         events.push(await lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'prevRoom', value: 'void', description: '' }));       }     }     continue;   }    var exits = await lib.getExitDestinations(loc);   var prev = dwarf.properties['prevRoom'] || 'void';   var filtered = exits.filter(function(dest) { return dest !== prev; });   if (filtered.length === 0) filtered = exits;   if (filtered.length === 0) continue;    var dest;   if (filtered.indexOf(room.id) !== -1 && await lib.chance(0.65)) {     dest = room.id;   } else {     dest = await lib.pick(filtered);   }    if (!dest) continue;   events.push(await lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'prevRoom', value: loc, description: '' }));   events.push(await lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: dest, description: '' }));    if (dest === room.id) {     output.push('A threatening little dwarf comes out of the shadows!');   } }  return { output: output.join(' '), events: events };

name: [encounter]-dwarf
perform: if (command.form !== 'transitive') return { output: '', events: [] }; var dwarf = object; if (dwarf.properties['dead'] === true) return { output: '', events: [] }; if (room.id === 'room:in-mirror-canyon') return await lib.result('The dwarf admires himself in the mirror.'); if (await lib.chance(0.048)) return await lib.result('The threatening little dwarf throws a nasty little knife at you, and it gets you!'); return await lib.result('The threatening little dwarf throws a nasty little knife at you, but it misses!');

name: throw-axe-dwarf
perform: var dwarf = indirect; var events = [await lib.moveTo('item:axe', { to: room.id, description: 'Axe lands in room' })]; if (await lib.chance(0.667)) {   events.push(await lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'dead', value: true, description: 'Dwarf killed' }));   events.push(await lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: 'void', description: '' }));   return { output: 'You killed a little dwarf! The body vanishes in a cloud of greasy black smoke.', events: events }; } events.push(await lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: 'void', description: '' })); return { output: 'Missed! The little dwarf dodges out of the way of the axe.', events: events };

name: [tick]-pirate-movement
check: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; if (dflag < 2) return false; var pirate = await lib.tryGet('npc:pirate'); if (!pirate) return false; if (pirate.properties['retired'] === true) return false; return pirate.location !== room.id && pirate.location !== 'void';
perform: var pirate = await lib.get('npc:pirate'); var loc = pirate.location; var exits = await lib.getExitDestinations(loc); if (exits.length === 0) return { output: '', events: [] }; var dest; if (exits.indexOf(room.id) !== -1 && await lib.chance(0.15)) {   dest = room.id; } else {   dest = await lib.pick(exits); } return { output: '', events: [await lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: dest, description: '' })] };

name: [tick]-pirate
check: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; if (dflag < 2) return false; var pirate = await lib.tryGet('npc:pirate'); if (!pirate) return false; if (pirate.properties['retired'] === true) return false; return pirate.location === room.id;
perform: var pirate = await lib.get('npc:pirate'); var events = []; var dwarves = (await lib.findByTag('dwarf')).filter(function(d) { return d.location === room.id && d.properties['dead'] !== true; }); if (dwarves.length > 0) {   events.push(await lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'void', description: '' }));   return { output: 'A bearded pirate appears, catches sight of the dwarf and runs away.', events: events }; } var carried = await lib.carried(); var treasures = carried.filter(function(e) { return e.tags.includes('treasure'); }); if (treasures.length === 0) {   if (pirate.properties['spotted'] === true) return { output: '', events: [] };   events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'spotted', value: true, description: '' }));   events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: '' }));   events.push(await lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' }));   return { output: 'There are faint rustling noises from the darkness behind you. As you turn toward them, you spot a bearded pirate. He is carrying a large chest. "Shiver me timbers!" he cries, "I\'ve been spotted! I\'d best hie meself off to the maze to hide me chest!" With that, he vanishes into the gloom.', events: events }; } events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'rich', value: true, description: '' })); if (pirate.properties['spotted'] === true) {   events.push(await lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: '' })); } for (var i = 0; i < treasures.length; i++) {   events.push(await lib.moveTo(treasures[i].id, { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' })); } events.push(await lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' })); return { output: 'Out from the shadows behind you pounces a bearded pirate! "Har, har," he chortles. "I\'ll just take all this booty and hide it away with me chest deep in the maze!" He snatches your treasure and vanishes into the gloom.', events: events };
